subject: Audio plays on wrong output device after dock
description: Headphones expected; sound goes to laptop speakers or HDMI monitor after undock/redock.

ts_steps.title: Select output
ts_steps.action: Quick Settings → volume — choose correct playback device; set as default in Sound settings.

ts_steps.title: Disable exclusivity
ts_steps.action: Sound → device Properties — disable 'Allow applications to take exclusive control' test.

ts_steps.title: Driver
ts_steps.action: Update audio and dock drivers from OEM; firmware update on dock if available.

internal_information: Windows default device drift on hardware change. Teams also has its own device picker inside call settings.
